name: Texas Car Title and Payday Loan Services, Inc.
description_short: Texas Car Title and Payday Loan Services offers same-day title, payday, and installment loans up to $15,000 in Sunnyvale, TX — no credit check required.
description_long:
Texas Car Title and Payday Loan Services, Inc. is a storefront lender operating at 3535 North Belt Line Road in Sunnyvale, Texas, serving the eastern DFW metro area including Mesquite, Garland, Balch Springs, and Forney. The company specializes in collateral-backed and income-based short-term lending for consumers who need immediate cash and cannot access traditional bank financing.

The Sunnyvale branch offers three distinct loan products. Car title loans allow vehicle owners to borrow against the appraised value of a lien-free vehicle — up to $15,000 — while retaining use of the car during repayment. Payday loans are short-term cash advances tied to the borrower's income, requiring a pay stub, valid ID, and active checking account. Installment loans provide larger amounts with fixed monthly payments, structured as a personal loan alternative for borrowers who need more time to repay.

What distinguishes this location is its emphasis on speed: the company advertises cash in as little as 30 minutes after vehicle inspection and document review. No credit check is required for title or payday loans, making these products accessible to consumers with damaged or no credit history. The online request form allows applicants to initiate the process remotely before arriving in-store, and a representative calls back immediately to confirm details. Store hours run Monday through Friday 10AM–6PM and Saturday 9AM–1PM.

Honestly, this lender fills a real gap for consumers who are asset-rich (own a paid-off vehicle) but cash-poor and credit-challenged. However, the website discloses no APR, interest rates, or fee structures — a significant transparency gap. Title loans in Texas carry high costs and the risk of vehicle repossession on default. Payday loans are similarly expensive short-term instruments. Borrowers should request full rate disclosures before signing and explore lower-cost alternatives if available.
address: 2041 S I-35 South Frontage Rd, San Marcos, TX 78666

company_info.headquarters: 2041 S I-35 South Frontage Rd, San Marcos, TX 78666

pros: Cash disbursed in as little as 30 minutes after vehicle inspection
Loan amounts up to $15,000 based on vehicle value and income
No credit check required for title and payday loan products
Borrower keeps and drives the vehicle throughout the repayment period
Three loan types available: title, payday, and installment loans
Online request form with immediate callback from a loan specialist
Walk-in store with local staff serving Sunnyvale, Mesquite, and Garland
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee information disclosed anywhere on the website
Title loans carry risk of vehicle repossession if the borrower defaults
Payday loans are short-term, high-cost instruments not suitable for ongoing financial shortfalls
Single physical location limits accessibility for borrowers outside the eastern DFW corridor
Sunday hours are unavailable; Saturday hours end at 1PM
best_for: Vehicle owners with a lien-free title who need same-day emergency cash
Consumers with poor or no credit history who cannot qualify for traditional bank loans
DFW-area residents in Sunnyvale, Mesquite, Garland, or Balch Springs facing urgent unexpected expenses
Borrowers who need installment-style repayment rather than a single lump-sum payback
diagnosis: Best suited for vehicle owners in the eastern DFW area who face a genuine financial emergency, have a paid-off car, and cannot qualify for conventional credit. The primary caveat is that interest rates and total loan costs are entirely absent from the website — borrowers must ask for full fee disclosure in-store before committing, as title loans in Texas are legally high-cost products with repossession risk on default.
services: Payday loans based on income verification
Installment loans with fixed monthly payments
Online loan request form with immediate specialist callback
No-credit-check loan qualification for title and payday products
Electronic fund deposits (same-day or next business day)
Lien-free title evaluation for loan sizing
In-person assistance from local loan specialists
